question: Resolve the earlier 0.20-vs-0.40 confound: with Jill's OWN Hit Rate OFF, is her core-hit fraction moved by FULL-BURST STATE itself, or was the gap just a boss-RANGE mismatch between the two windows? Measure (1) out-of-Full-Burst and (2) in-a-teammate's-Full-Burst at the SAME boss distance; (3) re-confirm Jill's own-burst (Hit Rate ON).
method: ffmpeg native-res frame extraction (60fps, 2622x1206 rotated) + montage color reads. Jill popups classified by NIKKE convention: red 'CORE HIT' = core, orange = crit non-core, white = normal non-core. Shots counted via on-screen ammo counter; DoT ticks (bottom-center, 1011368/1822868/379905) excluded from bullet counts. CRITICAL CONTROL: range matched on ACTUAL on-screen boss geometry, NOT on the engine band label. All three windows chosen where the boss is CENTERED-CLOSE (boss body framing Jill's head, arms/claws spread wide) so range is held constant by construction. Boss walks WITHIN a band, so the band label is not a reliable distance proxy here.

fb_ownership_map_near_band.note: Two Burst-III units (Jill + Helm) alternate the Full Burst cast. Jill's OWN burst => force-reload + True-Damage bullets (NO white/orange bullet popups; every bullet reads red CORE, ~1.65M/1.98M). Teammate (Helm) burst => Jill keeps normal bullets, dominant WHITE non-core popup present.
fb_ownership_map_near_band.FB4_video_60.5_69: HELM (white 486826 dominant) -- boss on the RIGHT this FB
fb_ownership_map_near_band.FB10_video_146.5_154.5: HELM (white 584192 dominant, NO force-reload cores) -- boss CENTERED-CLOSE this FB

1_out_of_full_burst_near.label: Out-of-Full-Burst gap (after FB4 ends, before FB5 banner). Jill Hit Rate OFF, no Full Burst.
1_out_of_full_burst_near.boss_geometry: CENTERED-CLOSE (boss body directly above Jill, two red claw-cores spread symmetric left/right)
1_out_of_full_burst_near.core_events_detail: 365738 at 70.2s; ~389301 (388965) at 73.0s. Everything else white 182869 (non-core) + orange crits 274303 (non-core, = 182869 x1.5).

2_teammate_full_burst_near.label: FB10 = HELM's Full Burst (Jill firing, Hit Rate OFF, Full Burst ON).
2_teammate_full_burst_near.boss_geometry: CENTERED-CLOSE (same pose/framing as window 1 -- boss body above Jill's head, claws spread). Matched range to window 1.
2_teammate_full_burst_near.core_events_detail: red 'CORE HIT 908743' at ~150.0s, ~151.8s, ~152.8s. Dominant popup = WHITE 584192 (non-core); orange crit 708512 late. (White value higher than window 1's 182869 only because Helm-FB team buff + later-fight stacks inflate the base -- a VALUE change, not a range change.)

3_jill_own_burst_near.label: FB3 = JILL's own Full Burst. Hit Rate ON (+80.78%), Full Burst ON.
3_jill_own_burst_near.core_events_detail: EVERY sampled bullet reads red 'CORE HIT' (1649753 or crit-core 1979704). ZERO white/orange bullet popups in the entire window.

matched_range_comparison.geometry_held_constant: boss CENTERED-CLOSE in all three windows (verified visually, not via band label)

verdict.reasoning: At MATCHED boss geometry (centered-close), out-of-Full-Burst (0.20) and in-a-teammate's-Full-Burst (0.23) are statistically indistinguishable -- Delta ~ +0.03, inside noise. Full-Burst STATE by itself does NOT move Jill's core-hit fraction.
verdict.earlier_0.20_vs_0.40_gap_explained: RANGE/POSITION artifact, not Full Burst. The prior 0.40 came from FB4, where the boss was OFF TO THE RIGHT (different geometry). When a teammate-FB is measured with the boss CENTERED-CLOSE (FB10), its core fraction drops to ~0.23 = the plain out-of-burst value. The 0.20->0.40 gap was two windows at different actual boss distances, exactly the shard-error this read existed to fix.
verdict.hit_rate_coefficient_implication: The Hit-Rate lift is the FULL 0.20 -> 0.95 jump (~+0.75). The HR-OFF baseline is ~0.20 regardless of Full-Burst state; do NOT use 0.40 as the baseline (it was range-contaminated). Core fraction is driven by (a) boss range/geometry and (b) Jill's own Hit Rate -- NOT by generic Full Burst.

confidence: MEDIUM-HIGH. Direction is clean and robust: teammate-FB == out-burst at matched geometry, both ~0.20; own-burst core-saturates ~0.95. All three windows read at the identical boss-centered-close pose. Exact fractions carry +/-0.05 (popup lingering across frames, ~10-14 shot samples). Ownership of FB10 as a teammate (Helm) burst is HIGH (many white non-core bullet popups + no force-reload cores = definitionally not Jill's True-Damage burst).
caveats: N per window is a per-window sample (~10-14 shots), not full-fight; fractions estimated from red-CORE-HIT label presence + ammo-tick shot counts.

Range matched on VISUAL boss geometry (centered-close) rather than the engine band label, because the boss strafes/roams within a band; FB10's early frames are nominally the midfar->near boundary by script but the boss is visually centered-close, matching windows 1 and 3.

Not separately re-measured: an out-of-burst window with the boss OFF TO THE RIGHT (would confirm the FB4-style 0.40 reproduces without Full Burst); inferred from the matched-range equality that boss position, not FB state, drives it.
